name: hud_sensor_get_mission_id
description: HudSensorTracker::GetMissionId returns the missionId field at offset 0xdc.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows thiscall getter bytes `mov eax, dword [ecx+0xdc]; retn`, and src/Battlesport/HudSensorTracker.h asserts offsetof(HudSensorTracker, missionId) == 0xdc.
The native smoke validates GetMissionId after InitMissionIdAndFlags and SetMissionId update the missionId field.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?GetMissionId@HudSensorTracker@@QAEHXZ at 0x417800 passed with zero unmasked mismatches; Binary Ninja body is 7 bytes and the VC object symbol is 16 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
